subcodes.first_line: O kind Lord! Give milk from the breast of forgiveness to Thy servant, Ardeshir, son of Bahram, and this humble attendant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند مهربان بنده درگاهت اردشیر پور بهرام را از پستان غفران شیر ده و چاکر
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed, @spiritual transformation, @presence of; reunion with God
